title: Genome-wide CRISPR guide RNA design and specificity analysis with GuideScan2
author: Schmidt, Henri
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Version 2.2.1 of the Guidescan2 command line interface and analysis scripts necessary for reproducing results in the manuscript "Genome-wide CRISPR guide RNA design and specificity analysis with GuideScan2" are stored here.
steps_raw: Version 2.2.1 of the Guidescan2 command line interface and analysis scripts necessary for reproducing results in the manuscript "Genome-wide CRISPR guide RNA design and specificity analysis with GuideScan2" are stored here.
